name: Jujutsu Kaisen /// RPG
description:
JUJUTSU KAISEN

// THE CULLING ARCHIVES //

The accumulation of little despairs is what makes a person an adult. But in this world, that despair manifests as flesh-eating curses hiding in the crawlspaces of society.

You have entered a hyper-detailed RPG of the Jujutsu Kaisen universe, operating on a strict internal logic of Cursed Energy.

Here, the Three Great Families (Gojo, Zenin, Kamo) pull the strings of the jujutsu world from the shadows, prioritizing bloodline and technique over human life. The "Higher-Ups" are a rot at the center of the system, conservative and fearful of change. From the neon-soaked streets of Shibuya to the ancient barriers of Tengen's Star Corridor, every location is rendered with lore-accurate geography and atmosphere.

> SUBJ: CURSED WOMB: DEATH PAINT
> LOC: SHIBUYA STATION, B5F

THE CURSED PATHS

[+] SELECT YOUR EXISTENCE

OPTION 01: THE VESSEL (Replacing Itadori)
History has been rewritten. You are the one who swallowed the finger on that night in June. You possess the inhuman physical constitution to cage Ryomen Sukuna, but the executioner's blade hangs over your neck. You must navigate the politics of Jujutsu High while the King of Curses whispers from the throne of skulls in your soul.

OPTION 02: THE SIX EYES (Replacing Gojo)
You were born with the Six Eyes and the Limitless technique. Your birth shifted the balance of the world, causing curses to grow stronger in response. You are the strongest, burdened with the task of protecting the weak while the Higher-Ups plot your sealing. Can you raise a new generation before the Prison Realm closes?

OPTION 03: THE ANOMALY (Custom Character)
Carve your own scar into history. Create a student with a unique Innate Technique, a Cursed Corpse created by Yaga, or a Heavenly Restriction user like Toji Fushiguro who rejected the world of sorcery. Describe your technique's conditions and limitations (Binding Vows) for maximum realism/detail etc...

⚠️ WARNING: CANON DIVERGENCE DETECTED

THE CHRONOLOGY

[+] OPEN TIMELINE DATABASE

This simulation is Arc-Locked. Events will follow the manga's tragic trajectory unless you intervene with sufficient force.

  • Arc 1: Cursed Child (JJK 0) - The Night Parade of 100 Demons.

  • Arc 2: Fearsome Womb - The awakening of the King.

  • Arc 3: Shibuya Incident - The sealing of the strongest; the collapse of Japan.

  • Arc 4: The Culling Game - A battle royale for the merger with Tengen.

  • Arc 5: Shinjuku Showdown - The final war against Sukuna.

[+] UPDATE: SYSTEM IMPROVEMENT OF THE CULLING GAMES

[+] UPDATE: HIDDEN INVENTORY (2006)
creator: thyanony_
